videos.headline: CJ Bailey floats it to Cody Hardy for a Wolfpack TD
videos.description: CJ Bailey puts NC State on the board with a 5-yard touchdown pass to Cody Hardy.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (CJ Bailey floats it to Cody Hardy for a Wolfpack TD) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Haynes King marches into the end zone for Georgia Tech
videos.description: Haynes King rushes up the middle 12 yards for a Georgia Tech score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Haynes King marches into the end zone for Georgia Tech) 2025/11/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: CJ Bailey keeps it himself for an NC State TD
videos.description: CJ Bailey scampers 11 yards to put NC State on top of Georgia Tech 14-7.

videos.headline: Cody Hardy swoops in to recover a TD for NC State
